ArchDox Agent Windows package
=============================

1. Extract this zip file.
2. Double-click "Install ArchDox Agent.bat".
3. The installer downloads/updates the Agent runtime.
4. The installer registers a Windows logon scheduled task named "ArchDox Agent".
5. After Windows login, the Agent starts automatically.

To remove auto start, double-click "Remove ArchDox Agent.bat".

This package includes a small Java runtime under the jre folder. You do not need
to install Java separately.
